503.description: Not-ready state; this probe representation is not Problem Details

200.description: Typed rows; literal source and user strings are unchanged
Pages keyed by stable section name
Machine counter deltas and no-data enums
Diffs keyed by stable section name

get.description: Queries one half-open source range of at most 31 days. Selection is limited to 1,048,576 retained observations and a 64 MiB cloned-observation charge.

200.description: Event and health summary of the range

get.description: Queries a canonical source set over a half-open range of at most 31 days. Selection is limited to 1,048,576 retained observations and a 64 MiB cloned-observation charge.
Queries one half-open source range of at most 31 days. Selection is limited to 1,048,576 retained observations and a 64 MiB cloned-observation charge.

200.description: Health line with explicit per-point coverage
Locale-neutral anomaly result with typed reasons
Locale-neutral incidents, evidence, catalogs, and typed reasons

timelineEventSources.name: source
timelineEventSources.description: Canonical source set; repeat source once per identifier

timelineFrom.name: from
timelineFrom.description: Inclusive range start in Unix microseconds

timelineTo.name: to
timelineTo.description: Exclusive range end in Unix microseconds

timelineHealthStep.name: step
timelineHealthStep.description: Requested health bucket width in microseconds

timelineEventsLimit.name: limit
timelineEventsLimit.description: Maximum events returned on one page

ProblemRequestId.description: Opaque server-generated correlation id used by instance

ProblemAllow.description: Methods supported by the addressed API resource

ProblemRetryAfter.description: Seconds before retrying an analytic capacity request

TimelineCapacityProblem.description: Timeline analytic-work or cursor-registry capacity error

Retry-After.description: Present only for analytic_capacity_unavailable; absent for cursor_capacity_unavailable

NeutralObject.description: Machine data only; raw source and user strings remain literal

B64UrlSha256.description: Unpadded base64url encoding of a SHA-256 value

event_id.description: Semantic identifier derived from published semantic fields

by_severity.description: Counts in error, fatal, panic, warning, log order

by_category.description: Counts in lock, constraint, serialization, timeout, connection, auth, syntax, resource, data_corruption, system, other order
